series_metadata.series_description: Reports, policies, guildelines, clarifications, correspondence and related materials concerning the academic challenge program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 4 years, in records storage 5 years or until audited by the State Auditor and report is released. Academic challenge was included in the review of "Selective Excellence" by HCHEMS. Round 3 to be retained in the office until 1997., Paper: Wastepaper
